_publications._publicationTitle: Spatial Gene-Expression Profiling Unveils Immuno-oncogenic Programs of NF1-Associated Peripheral Nerve Sheath Tumor Progression.

_contextSnippet: In the DhhCre model, Cenpf expression was significantly increased in GEM-PNST compared to PST (p=0.0035), but was not significant compared to NF (p=0.1126)
details: Cenpf expression was significantly increased in GEM-PNST compared to PST (p=0.0035), but was not significant compared to NF (p=0.1126)
